messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

Under some circumstances an Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability in Johnson Controls Metasys ADS/ADX/OAS 10 versions prior to 10.1.6 and 11 versions prior to 11.0.3 allows API calls to expose credentials in plain text.

An Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability exists in certain versions of Johnson Controls Metasys ADS/ADX/OAS software. Versions 10 prior to 10.1.6 and versions 11 prior to 11.0.3 may allow API calls to reveal credentials in plain text under specific conditions.
